episodes.title: 45. Financial Abuse, Marrying Into a Cult and a Narcissistic Mother on the Stand (Emily’s Story)
episodes.description:
**This episode contains content that may be alarming for some listeners, including depictions of domestic violence, financial abuse and cult-related trauma. If you or a loved one are struggling in these areas, please visit the resources below for help and more information. 

This week on The Traumedy Show, Emily Rose, founder of The Mama Wilder Foundation, details her story of surviving domestic violence, financial abuse and the isolation that came with marrying into a religious cult. She takes us through the painful unraveling of that life—how control was disguised as faith and how she ultimately found the strength to leave.

But her story doesn’t end there. Emily fought her ex-husband in criminal and family court for domestic violence and for custody of her children. And, in a stunning turn, her now-husband helped her take back her power—by cross-examining her narcissistic mother in the courtroom. It’s a story of pain, escape, the pursuit of justice and the kind of love that helps you rebuild.

Resources:

National Domestic Violence Hotline: 1-800-799-7233

episodes.title: 30. How I Overcame My Narcissistic Patterns and Escaped a Cult (Jacob’s Story)
episodes.description:
This one's for the boys! Join us for this exciting episode with special guest Jacob as he shares his inspiring and vulnerable journey of personal growth and transformation. His candid account delves into themes of manipulation, religious cults, redemption and the complexities of navigating relationships.
Jacob opens up about his past experiences with relationships, his struggles with emotional detachment and the life-altering turning points that led him to self-discovery and healing. From dealing with family dynamics in a single-parent household to his time in a controlling religious group, Jacob offers insightful reflections on how these experiences shaped him.
This episode is a testament to the power of change, shedding light on male vulnerability and the importance of genuine connections and self-awareness. Tune in to hear about Jacob's compelling path to becoming a more compassionate and self-aware individual, marking a journey filled with humor, honesty and inspiration.
